enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of Kaiya Pudichaa Tharumaru?

The song was released in 2018.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Hip Hop Tamizha.

What is the theme of the song?

The song has an upbeat and energetic theme, perfect for parties and celebrations.

What is the context of the song in the movie Kalakalappu 2?

The song is featured in a lively and fun sequence, adding to the film's comedic and entertaining vibe.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kaiya Pudichaa Tharumaru from Kalakalappu 2 is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly complements the film's comedic and lively atmosphere. Sung by Hip Hop Tamizha, the song's catchy beats and playful lyrics make it a favorite for parties and celebrations. It captures the essence of fun and joy, encouraging listeners to dance and enjoy the moment. The song's upbeat nature and engaging rhythm make it a standout number in the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Kaiya Pudichaa Tharumaru from the lively film Kalakalappu 2. Hip Hop Tamizha's energetic beats and catchy lyrics make this track an instant hit for any celebration. Dive into the vibrant world of Tamil cinema with this unforgettable dance number!
stanzaMeanings: If you hold my hand, it's amazing. If you hug me, it's amazing. If you smile a little, it's amazing. Because of you, girl, my heart feels like it's spinning around.
Ok, ok, now everything is ok, locked with you.
Oh beautiful one, but still, in beauty, no one surpasses you in this world.
Non-stop love can't be stopped. Even if you say hi or bye, it won't break my heart.
Tell me your height, tell me your weight. I'll lift you and go to the gym. I'll become like Arnold and live strong with you.
Ok, ok, now everything is ok, locked with you.
Oh beautiful one, but still, in beauty, no one surpasses you in this world. No one, no one, no one.
